CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Continued To Nov-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David M. Lilienstein, Esq. (415-678-5050) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorneys, Romeo S. Quinto and Kristal D. Petrovich of Morgan Lewis (312-324-1167) appear as counsels for defendant/moving party Logos Missions, Inc.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT LOGOS MISSIONS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, which does not fairly characterize the complaint and improperly disputes facts, is OVERRULED. First & Second Causes of Action: (a) the adjective "so-called" expresses a view that a name/ term is inappropriate, not that it is true (see FAC para. 7), (b) the contract need not be attached to the complaint; its legal effect may be pled, and its precise language need not be stated (Construction Protective Services, Inc. v. TIG Specialty Ins. Co. (2002) 29 Cal.App.4th 189, 198-99), (c) in fact, a "contract for insurance" is pled (see, e.g., FAC para. 48). Third Cause of Action: (a) extreme and outrageous conduct is adequately pled, (b) as already noted, plaintiff does allege the existence of an insurance policy; a "fiduciary-like duty" is also pled (FAC para. 78.). Fifth Cause of Action: unlawful, unfair and/or fraudulent practices are adequately pled. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176, email: geales@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Continued To Aug-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David M. Lilienstein of DL Law Group (415-678-5050) appears with one other person who does not check in as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorneys Romeo Quinto and Kristal D. Petrovich of Morgan Lewis (312-324-1167) appear as counsel for defendant/moving party, Logos Mission, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court vacates the tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT LOGOS MISSIONS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to August 18, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to be heard by Judge Richard Ulmer. Demurring party shall file as soon as possible a declaration showing compliance with CCP 430.41. Court is inclined to grant additional time to answer or demur if needed by the parties.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
